prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年北京中医药大学在江苏物理类最低录取位次分别为约25631名、31438名、39518名、39109名、35803名。整体呈波动后移趋势，2021至2023年累计后移约13887名，2024年略有回升，2025年又前移至35803名，近两年波动幅度约3300名，2025年基准位次为35803名；该校在江苏物理类招生计划2021年24人、2022年27人、2023年28人、2024年31人、2025年35人，呈逐年扩招趋势。2026年计划为38人，较2025年再增3人，扩幅约8.6%，招生名额持续增加对录取位次有后移作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京中医药大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名从2021年第103名持续上升至2025年第61名、2026年第63名，排名大幅跃升，学校综合实力和认可度显著提升，对报考热度有正向推动作用；2026年声誉监测显示该校评价为偏负面，主要原因是2025年录取季在河北、河南等省份录取位次下滑超500名，中医学专业在黑龙江、吉林等省份出现断档，最低录取位次跌至二本线，可能对考生报考心理产生一定负面影响。抖音热度排名第103位，评价为一般，短视频曝光度不高；中医学、中药学、中西医结合均为该校王牌学科（第五轮学科评估中获评A+等级），针灸推拿学等专业实力突出，在中医药领域具有全国领先地位，对有志于中医药事业的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度分析显示，临床医学类持续高热推荐，中医药相关专业社会关注度保持稳定偏热；江苏2026年高考总报名约52.1万人，较2025年大幅增加，其中物理类考生估算约38万人，较2025年约26万人增长显著，竞争加剧对位次有前移作用。，物理类本科批从2021年417分逐步升至2025年463分，整体平稳；北京中医药大学位于北京市，对江苏考生属于跨省报考，该校在江苏招生占比约3%-6%，近年呈上升趋势，无显著地域偏好偏差。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合招生计划持续扩招（+8.6%）、学校排名大幅跃升（软科从103升至63）、声誉偏负面（断档新闻）、江苏考生规模显著增加等多重因素，扩招和负面声誉倾向于位次后移，排名上升和考生增加倾向于位次前移。经权衡，预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约37444名，区间36944-37944名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing University of Chinese Medicine in Jiangsu Physics Category were approximately 25631, 31438, 39518, 39109, and 35803 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 13887 places from 2021 to 2023, a slight recovery in 2024, and a forward shift to 35803 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 3300 places, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being 35803. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category was 24 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 31 in 2024, and 35 in 2025, showing a year-on-year expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 38, an increase of 3 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 8.6%. The continuous increase in enrollment quotas has a backward effect on admission rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has continuously risen from 103rd in 2021 to 61st in 2025 and 63rd in 2026, showing a significant leap. The university's comprehensive strength and recognition have notably improved, positively influencing application enthusiasm. However, the 2026 reputation monitoring shows a slightly negative evaluation, mainly due to a decline of over 500 places in admission rankings in provinces such as Hebei and Henan during the 2025 admission season, and a gap in majors like Traditional Chinese Medicine in Heilongjiang and Jilin, where the minimum admission ranking dropped to the second-tier line, potentially negatively affecting candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 103rd, rated as average, with low short video exposure. Traditional Chinese Medicine, Chinese Materia Medica, and Integrated Chinese and Western Medicine are all flagship disciplines of the university (rated A+ in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), with outstanding strength in Acupuncture and Tuina, holding a national leading position in the field of Traditional Chinese Medicine, strongly attracting candidates aspiring to a career in Traditional Chinese Medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The 2026 major popularity analysis shows that Clinical Medicine remains highly recommended, while Traditional Chinese Medicine-related majors maintain stable and slightly hot social attention. The total number of Jiangsu Gaokao registrations in 2026 is about 521,000, a significant increase from 2025, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 380,000, a notable increase from about 260,000 in 2025, intensifying competition and having a forward effect on rankings. The Physics Category undergraduate batch line gradually rose from 417 in 2021 to 463 in 2025, remaining stable overall. Beijing University of Chinese Medicine is located in Beijing, making it a cross-province application for Jiangsu candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 3%-6%, showing an upward trend in recent years, with no significant regional preference bias.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the continuous expansion of enrollment plans (+8.6%), a significant leap in university ranking (Soft Science from 103 to 63), a slightly negative reputation (gap news), and a notable increase in the number of Jiangsu candidates, the expansion and negative reputation tend to push rankings backward, while the ranking increase and candidate increase tend to push rankings forward. After weighing, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 37444, with a range of 36944-37944.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 36944-37944, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, Tier 1 majors can be attempted (if the ranking is better than the lower limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Traditional Chinese Medicine (Leading Talent Training Program) and 5+3 Integrated majors have extremely high admission rankings (about 6700-14000 in 2025), far exceeding the predicted range, so they are not recommended for application. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors such as Chinese Materia Medica, Acupuncture and Tuina, and Traditional Chinese Medicine Orthopedics and Traumatology.
